name: Grilled Quesadilla with Smoked Salmon & Fresh Dill (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. Place 2 tortillas on a work surface. Sprinkle half the cheeses, onion, and dill on each tortilla, and season with salt and pepper.
3. Stack the layers of cheese, onion, and dill onto one tortilla, then place the second tortilla on top to cover. Brush both sides with oil.
4. Grill for 3 minutes per side or until crispy and the cheese has melted.
5. Cut into quarters and serve topped with Dill Sour Cream and smoked salmon slices.
Dill Sour Cream:
1. Combine sour cream and dill in a bowl, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve. Bring to room temperature before serving.
Yield: 4 servings
Note: This recipe was provided by Gail Shermeyer ().
